transcript.text:
[Passed down since the year 1968...]
[Came once and became a regular for the past 40 years...]
[Hyesung Kalguksu]
[Many have recommended!]
[Huge portions]
5 bowls by yourself?
There's no way
She's a stranger person...
[Are you eating it all?]
[Of course]
[Non-stop noodle slurps]
[And the soup too?!]
[Clean]
What if no one takes your hand in marriage?
Who would take a girl that eats 5 bowls of noodles?
Hello everyone

I'm here at Cheongnyangri, Seoul
There's a very famous noodle restaurant here
They started in 1968
And been holding their place down for over 50 years
They only have 2 items on the menu Just 2 different types of noodles
That's how you know it's a good spot
Ta-da Over here
[Hyesung Kalguksu] [Dongdaemun, Seoul]
A lot of you guys recommended this place, so I'm here
Let's head inside
Hello~
Which noodle bowls do you have?
-Chicken broth and anchovy broth -And nothing else, right?
3 chicken noodles,
And 2 anchovy noodles, please
Is your party here?

No, it's all for myself
5 bowls of noodles by yourself?
There's no way
I'm a big eater
No, but still
Our portions are huge
That's why I only ordered 5 and not 8
[Speechless]
She ordered 5
[Who in their right mind...]
[The chef seems to recognize Tzuyang]
[Those who don't know her are doubting her]
[There's literally no way]
[Customer that knows her]
She can eat it all!
She ate so many steaks in New York in one sitting

I've been told that their kimchi is the best
Very curious
Not aged, but still tasty!
It's not a fresh one either What is it?
Almost like the ones we make at home
Tzuyang She eats that much?
How does she even digest it all?
How will she get married?
Do you not get a belly?
I digest quickly, so not really
[Oh my]
She's a very strange person
[Stranger danger]
[He's searching her up]
Set up her table
What are you doing?

[Pull yourself together]
[Kalguksu noodles serving right up~!]
Thank you~
3 chicken noodles
2 anchovy noodles
Thank you
Looks delish
The portions are huge
Let's try the anchovy noodles first
They make the noodles here first thing in the morning
[VIP seats]
The noodles are chewy and tasty!
The soup is very deep
Very savory
Not salty, but still has a strong flavor
They make the kimchi here too

Hot
They make the dough and cut it here
Deep flavors
Wow, thick
With kimchi on top
Goes well together Look how red it is
I love how it doesn't taste like flour
1 down
[Well that was fast]
Chicken noodles here
With chicken meat
It's a bit different!
The base of the broth is the same
Except this has anchovy flavors
And this has chicken flavors
The soup itself is very strong

Strong flavors, but keeping the standard broth taste
Yummy
I was cold earlier
But now I'm all warmed up
Kalguksu is for winter days
The soup is nice and thick I like it like this
I can just tell this is chicken
This had very strong anchovy flavors
This one is cut thicker
I'll move some so that the noodles don't get too bloated
There's sauce for this too
-Garlic? -Yes, it's a bit spicy
The flavors change completely with the sauce
Mix it up well
It's turning red
Some soup

Very strong garlic taste
In a good way
It gave it even more flavor
The noodles taste different too
Just so that it doesn't get too bloated
[Divide it up]
It flew out
There
I put a lot this time
That's a lot of garlic flavor
My hoodie is already a mess
With chicken
-I don't think she can do it -You think so?
We give huge portions
Right, it's a lot of food
[It doesn't matter]

For the one with the garlic paste,
It gives it a very good garlic flavor to it and it's refreshing
So I prefer this one more
I'm crying from the spiciness
The soup is amazing
I noticed I close my eyes when I eat
But I have to when I slurp because the soup can splash into my eyes
-You eat very well -Really? Thank you
In the summer, Summer?
It's very nice to eat hot food like this in the winter
Hot food is still good on the hot summer days under the cold air conditioning
You're right Hot food on a hot day (fight fire with fire)
It's hot My tongue is a little numb
So it feels hotter
When someone finishes 1 bowl
and orders 1 more after,

We don't charge after that
You just give them the extra bowl of noodles?
-Even if someone finishes 1 bowl and eats 10 more after -Yes
Really? It becomes all-you-can-eat?
I wonder how the anchovy noodles taste with the sauce
I love this too It's very flavorful
I feel like these taste better over time
I'm not sure if it's because they just sit and release more flavors
It just tastes better and better
The noodles are still very elastic It doesn't just get cut off right away
The noodles are not soggy!
I love the garlic sauce It gives it so much flavor
Very good garlic taste
I'm already almost finished
Kimchi!
On top

Chicken noodles
1 small bowl
Chicken tastes great
Let's drink the chicken broth
So much flavor
That's delicious
It wasn't as thick at first
But now it's really deep
Just curious if she has stomach problems
[She is very healthy according to the health check-up]
Can you eat more than this?
Yes, I can
Wow, that's just incredible
Amazing~!
I really like both of them, but
I personally like the chicken more just because of the meat

That's spicy!
I'm losing my mind That's really spicy!
The first time anyone has eaten 5 bowls
First and last time probably
What if no one takes your hand in marriage?
Who would take a girl that eats 5 bowls of noodles?
How many times do you go to the toilet?
I go daily
Yes, you have to!
Or it won't be good
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
